title: rubus gratiosus
intro: Rubus gratiosus, also known as the grateful or sweet thimbleberry, is a species of thimbleberry that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote overall health. The health benefits of Rubus gratiosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Rubus gratiosus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
